stages.name: spec
stages.notes: Feature spec defined with 6 acceptance criteria

stages.name: plan
stages.notes: 3 tasks identified: schema loader, editor UI, validation engine

stages.name: build
stages.notes: All components implemented with schema selection, JSON editing, and live validation

stages.name: audit
stages.notes: No critical findings. 1 medium: add error boundary. 2 info: style consistency.

stages.name: checkpoint
stages.notes: Pre-ship gate: tests passing, lint clean, schemas valid

stages.name: ship
stages.notes: Feature complete. Documentation updated. Benchmark artifact generated.

uncertainty_notes: Token counts are estimated based on typical prompt/response sizes for similar tasks
Cost estimate uses published API pricing at time of benchmark; actual cost depends on caching and context reuse
Build duration includes human-equivalent estimation for autonomous execution
